children.html: f(v1)=f(11)=f(2⋅1+11−1)=(30)f(v2)=f(1−1)=f(2⋅1−11+1)=(12)f(\boldsymbol{v}_1) = f \begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 1 \end{pmatrix} = f \begin{pmatrix} 2\cdot 1 + 1 \\ 1 - 1 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 3 \\ 0 \end{pmatrix} \\ f(\boldsymbol{v}_2) = f \begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ -1 \end{pmatrix} = f \begin{pmatrix} 2 \cdot 1 - 1 \\ 1 + 1 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 2 \end{pmatrix}f(v1​)=f(11​)=f(2⋅1+11−1​)=(30​)f(v2​)=f(1−1​)=f(2⋅1−11+1​)=(12​)
